executive_summary: This report is based on limited evidence, so all feedback should be considered a low-confidence watch list. The primary areas to monitor are room engagement, ensuring a more even scan and quicker return to audience-facing orientation. Also, observe gesture size and posture to ensure they support teaching points effectively. No material interventions are suggested due to the low reliability of the data.
no_material_intervention_needed_reason: Evidence quality is too limited to justify corrective feedback in this clip.
